summary: Backend-only testing for Quest Hero expansion features. Created comprehensive pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_quest_hero.py with 20 tests covering all 6 new expansion features. All 20/20 tests passed (100% backend success rate). Live AI image generation calls were intentionally avoided (credit-conscious) — verified endpoint registration via 422 validation response and cache behavior via manual cache insertion in MongoDB.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: The /api/villains/{villain_name}/generate-image endpoint takes image_prompt as a query parameter rather than a request body — minor REST design issue but functional.
Streak logic: If a user skips a day (streak.last_completion_date is neither today nor yesterday), it resets to 1 which is correct. Tested and verified.
Monthly recurrence uses fixed +30 days approximation (acceptable; documented in code as 'Approximate month').
server.py file is approaching ~660 lines; consider splitting into modules (stories.py, tasks.py, streaks.py, villains.py routers) if it grows further.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_-prefixed tasks, custom stories, and image_cache entries for testing. All cleaned up via module-scoped pytest fixture (before+after). Also resets user_progress and user_streak collections during run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test file is /app/backend/tests/test_quest_hero.py. Run with: cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_quest_hero.py -v. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL is read from env (not EXPO_BACKEND_URL — note the PUBLIC). MongoDB cleanup happens automatically. Live AI image generation NOT tested to save credits — endpoint registration verified via 422 validation response. Wild West regression test (full 10-beat playthrough, 4 badges, 300 points) passes.

tests_verified.stories: GET /api/stories returns all 6 built-in stories with required fields; all 6 expected IDs present (wild-west-redemption, space-odyssey, medieval-quest, detective-noir, zombie-apocalypse, pirate-treasure)
tests_verified.custom_story: POST /api/stories/custom creates story with FINALE in last act; DELETE works; villains<num_acts returns 400
tests_verified.streak: Default empty streak structure correct; current_streak=1 after first completion; multiple same-day completions do NOT double-count current_streak (stays at 1) but total_completions increments
tests_verified.recurring_tasks: daily creates +1 day, weekly +7 days, monthly +30 days, once does NOT create next instance
tests_verified.tasks_range: GET /api/tasks/range?start=...&end=... returns tasks in range correctly
tests_verified.story_abandon: POST /api/stories/abandon ends active story; returns 404 when none active
tests_verified.villain_image: GET returns image_data=null when uncached; returns cached value when manually inserted; POST endpoint registered (returns 422 for missing query param, not 404)
tests_verified.regression: Full Wild West playthrough: 10 beats completed, 4 badges earned (First Blood, Bank Guardian, Town Defender, Sheriff of the West), 300 points total, story marked complete
